surface.title: Store
surface.headline: A product catalog that actually looks like a store.
surface.lead: This storefront demo gives implementers a clear pattern for categories, product cards, pricing and a checkout summary without exposing administration.

academy.name: Academy Pack
academy.body: Templates for onboarding, lessons, evaluations and certification flows.

dispatch.name: Dispatch Console
dispatch.body: A demo product for assignments, activity logs and field coordination screens.

inventory.name: Inventory Kit
inventory.body: Cards, status markers and handover concepts for stock and equipment tracking.

compliance.name: Compliance Board
compliance.body: Visual structure for policies, reviews, approvals and evidence follow-up.

surface.note: Prices and products are placeholders intended to demonstrate a public commerce surface.
